name: Game Time Glizzys
short_description: Cook and serve a delicious assortment of hot dogs in this fast-paced cooking sim. Fend off attacks and sabotages from your competitors while making enough money to get out of debt to keep your hotdog stand alive!
detailed_description:
Setting:

Your humble hot dog stand is nestled in between your most heated rivals inside of a failing hockey rink. Your appliances are broken, your rating is at an all-time low, and you only have a few days to turn things around or else you'll be out of business. 

Gameplay:

Before the start of each shift, prep your stand by cooking up hotdogs and french fries before the dinner rush arrives. Customers will start out patient, but soon will demand faster service as the shifts progress. Unlock more appliances to cook more expensive recipes to earn more money. Repair broken appliances and power outages caused by your competitors, and hire your friend Ace to break their appliances, turn off their power, and steal money from them! Become the ruler of the rink!

Two Game Modes:

Career Mode:

Pay back your loan within 7 days to win the game. Survive sabotages from your competitors and hire your friends to attack them back. Playtime ~30 minutes.

Sandbox Mode:

Choose how you want to play! Just looking to cook some dogs and chill? Turn off sabotages and win/lose conditions to play forever. Looking for a more challenging experience? Dial up the sabotages and set a max order failure rate and see how long you can last!

SERVE

Serve a variety of delicious, quality food such as hot dogs, french fries and drinks, to eager customers at the rink! The customers are not the most patient bunch, so accuracy and speed is key!

UPGRADE

Upgrade your stand to include new appliances, unlocking better recipes to keep your customers coming back!

SABOTAGE

Hire your friends to sabotage your competitors' stands to keep them from sabotaging yours! Cut their power, destroy their appliances and attempt to rob them to make sure your stand is the top stand at the rink!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
